---
description: "Bootstrap the project. Use when: first-time setup, fresh clone, or after dependency changes."
---

# Install & Prime

## Steps

1. READ `tac_practise/CLAUDE.md` to understand the project
2. RUN the following in `tac_practise/`:
   ```bash
   npm install
   ```
3. VERIFY:
   ```bash
   npm run build
   npm run lint
   ```
4. SUMMARIZE: List the tech stack, available scripts, and current component structure
